notes: T062: MerlinLairScene.ts 470 lines. 3D interior: stone walls (BoxGeometry 0x3a3228), flagstone floor, ceiling, 4 wooden cross-beams (0x3d2b1a), mortar lines (7 slabs). 4 raycaster zones: map=BoxGeometry scroll on table, crystal=SphereGeometry 0x9060cc emissive purple PointLight 2.5 range 8, bookshelf=3-row 18-book frame with invisible BoxGeometry hitTarget, door=frame+panel+iron straps+light sliver+PointLight 0xffdd66. Raycaster: mousemove+click, scale 1.0→1.05 hover, cursor:pointer. Camera fixed PerspectiveCamera(62) [0,0.5,7] lookAt [0,0,-4], sway sin(t*0.94)*0.1 x + sin(t*0.72)*0.06 y. Fog 0x0d0a08 near=12 far=28. T064: 3 candles — each: CylinderGeometry body+wick, PointLight 1.8 range 4.5 + 20 orange particles AdditiveBlending upward drift maxLife=1.2s with horizontal jitter. Flicker: 3-frequency sin layering (7.3Hz/13.1Hz/3.7Hz). 80 dust motes Points 0.35 opacity wrap-bounds drift. Cauldron: SphereGeometry scale.y=0.8, 3 legs, PointLight 0x22cc44, 30 green steam particles. Potions: 3 emissive cylinders+necks. Skull: SphereGeometry cranium+jaw. dispose() cleans all geometries+materials+event listeners.
